name: Garlic Soup II
recipeIngredient: 6 Cloves crushed garlic (or more to taste)
3 medium Ripe tomatoes - peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pan; add garlic. Cook over gentle heat 1-2 minutes until soft but not brown.
2. Add breadcrumbs and cook over medium heat for 3 minutes or until they turn a light golden brown.
3. Add tomatoes, paprika, chilli powder, and water. Bring to the boil; simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
4. Add eggs in a thin stream to the simmering soup. Cook over low heat for 2 minutes longer.
5. Pour into serving bowl, sprinkle with parsley, and serve.
NOTE: Serve hot and heavily seasoned.
